_note: The dashed box is the structural treatment and lives on the dashedAddWrap container: borderType:'custom' with all four sides 1.5px dashed (per-side border channel renders), a 6px radius, full width and centred content with comfortable vertical padding so it reads as a list-footer 'add' affordance. The hairline is the neutral #e5e7eb (structural). COLOUR IS OUT OF SCOPE: the button TEXT/icon is brand — but a 'link' button takes its colour from the app-theme primary (buttonGroup colour is app-theme, never per-button), so it is carried as a $role placeholder on the item in the skeleton, NOT a hex here. Do NOT add an orange/green hex to this overlay.
